s1-solo-gate.descriptionZh: 仅 Stargate 本地账号认证，最少依赖，快速上线。
s1-solo-gate.descriptionEn: Stargate-only local auth with minimum dependencies for quick startup.
s1-solo-gate.riskNoteZh: 适用于小规模或临时环境；生产建议升级到 S4 及以上。
s1-solo-gate.riskNoteEn: Best for small or temporary setups; move to S4+ for production.

s2-solo-gate-session-redis.descriptionZh: Stargate + Redis 会话，提升多实例一致性。
s2-solo-gate-session-redis.descriptionEn: Stargate with Redis-backed sessions for multi-instance consistency.
s2-solo-gate-session-redis.riskNoteZh: 仍为本地账号模式，建议仅用于过渡或内部场景。
s2-solo-gate-session-redis.riskNoteEn: Still local-account mode; recommended for internal or transitional usage.

s3-gate-warden.descriptionZh: 引入白名单与用户目录，认证与身份源解耦。
s3-gate-warden.descriptionEn: Use Warden for whitelist and identity source decoupling.
s3-gate-warden.riskNoteZh: 未接入 Herald OTP，适合先完成用户源收敛的阶段。
s3-gate-warden.riskNoteEn: No Herald OTP yet; suitable when first unifying identity source.

s4-gate-warden-herald.descriptionZh: OTP 主链路完整拆分，Stargate 专注 session。
s4-gate-warden-herald.descriptionEn: Full OTP split architecture: Stargate focuses on session validation.
s4-gate-warden-herald.riskNoteZh: 生产推荐基线；请替换所有密钥并启用审计/限流。
s4-gate-warden-herald.riskNoteEn: Recommended production baseline; replace all keys and enable audit/rate limits.

s5-gate-warden-herald-plugins.descriptionZh: 在 S4 基础上启用 SMTP/SMS/DingTalk/TOTP 插件。
s5-gate-warden-herald-plugins.riskNoteZh: 插件模式涉及外部通道，需重点关注幂等、限流与审计。
s5-gate-warden-herald-plugins.riskNoteEn: Plugin mode introduces external channels; enforce idempotency, rate limits and audit.
